description:
OL 316 (REV. 7/2020) WWW
Autonomous Mode 
Conventional Mode
Additional information attached.
A Zoox vehicle (Vehicle 1) operating in manual mode was traveling east on Mariposa Street toward Hampshire Street in San Francisco 
when contact was made with the left side fender of a parked pickup (Vehicle 2). The Zoox vehicle's front passenger-side door and fender 
were damaged. No injuries were reported, and police were not notified.
